name: DCP Midstream LP 7.95% Series C Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Units
summary: DCP Midstream LP is a master limited partnership that gathers, processes, transports, stores, and markets natural gas and natural gas liquids. The 7.95% Series C Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Units represent a form of equity ownership in the partnership with a preference for dividend payments. The company is headquartered in Denver, Colorado.
